items.text:
# **PAID IMMERSIVE ACTORS WANTED | WEST SUSSEX | OCTOBER 2026**

**Something strange is happening in West Sussex this October...**

Hi, I'm Davey, founder of **Ezra Immersive**.

After almost 20 years creating scare attractions, immersive theatre and live horror experiences for companies across the UK, I'm launching my own immersive theatre company, and I'm looking for performers to help bring our very first experience to life.

**RSVP** is a 75-minute immersive horror experience where audiences become guests at Tommy Crimble's 10th birthday party...

Again.

What starts as an awkward, painfully British birthday party slowly descends into something far more sinister.

Think **The League of Gentlemen** meets **The Texas Chain Saw Massacre**, with the escalating tension of **Resident Evil 7**, wrapped inside an interactive immersive theatre experience where comedy gradually gives way to horror.

We're casting five unforgettable characters:

• ***Tommy Crimble ***– the birthday boy who's definitely turning ten...
***• Pauline*** – the relentlessly cheerful mum determined to throw the perfect party.
***• Keith*** – the painfully polite father who believes there's a right way to do absolutely everything.
***• Nana ***– mostly asleep... until she isn't.
***• Kev*** – the painfully cringe party entertainer who's trying his best to keep the party going.

We're looking for performers who love creating characters, improvising with audiences and embracing both comedy and horror. Experience in immersive theatre, scare attractions or interactive performance is a bonus, but attitude, creativity and strong instincts are far more important.

**These are paid roles** based in **West Sussex**, with performances taking place across October 2026.

If this sounds like your kind of weird...

Head to my **Linktree** below and click **"Casting Call – RSVP"** for the full casting pack, character breakdowns, performance dates and application details. Or drop me an email at **hi@ezraimmersive.com**

See you at the party.

https://linktr.ee/Daveyfoxezra

items.text:
Paid Casting Call for Dating Show

We’re casting for a test filming of a new social dating show taking place in Central London.

Filming will take place in the evening for roughly 6 hours. Participants will receive £100 payment. 

We’re looking for genuine people, comfortable on camera and open to participating in a fun, interactive dating format. 

This is a great opportunity to be part of an early-stage concept and help us shape the future of it.

If you’re interested, please send a message or comment below and we’ll be in touch with more details

Having so much fun on Mondays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
Hi everyone! Bit of an unusual casting… or maybe a semi-casting!
I’m Bella, and I own a couple of shoot locations in London (SE5). If you’d like to take a look, they’re here:

www.smashyowlstudios.com

I’m desperate to create more content for my studios (that I’ll be shooting myself), and I thought it could be really fun to turn it into a bit of a regular social event—maybe once a month or every couple of weeks.

I’m looking for a small group of fellow content creators who also need to shoot content for their own social media. I thought it could be a great way to meet other creatives in the city, bounce ideas off each other, take turns being each other’s camera operator, and generally help each other create better content.

I’m more than happy for us to use both of my studios while we’re doing it, and we could throw in some food, a couple of drinks, and make a proper social occasion of it too.

If that sounds like something you’d be interested in, drop me a message!

Thanks,

Bella

topComments.text: I would be interested. Would like to bounce some ideas off someone

items.text:
Seit 2014 gehört Cosplay fest zur Leipziger Buchmesse. In diesem Beitrag haben wir die Anfänge festgehalten, denn schon 2011 waren die Messehallen voller Manga-Comic- und Fantasiegestalten.

Cosplay has been an integral part of the Leipzig Book Fair since 2014. In this article, we capture its beginnings, as the exhibition halls were already filled with manga, comic, and fantasy characters back in 2011.

Hello! Dan Bell Casting is casting Multi-Generational Latinx/Hispanic families for a national commercial.

Must be located in Los Angeles and native Spanish speakers! 

Please email us for self-tape audition instructions at danbellcastingoutreach@gmail.com.

SAG Commercial - (Pays each person approx. $830/day)

Auditions: ASAP

Fitting: 7/26/26-7/27/26

Shoots: 7/28/26-7/31/26

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Criteria:

1. Married Couple/Parents Ages 38-50

2. Two children ages 10-18 

3. An uncle/aunt ages 38-50

4. Their child (the cousin) ages 15-20 

5. One Grandparent ages 60-75

SAG Commercial - (Pays each person approx. $830/day)

Auditions: ASAP

Fitting: 7/26/26-7/27/26

Shoots: 7/28/26-7/31/26

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Criteria:

1. Married Couple/Parents Ages 38-50

2. Two children ages 10-18 

3. An uncle/aunt ages 38-50

4. Their child (the cousin) ages 15-20 

5. One Grandparent ages 60-75
items.title: Hello! Dan Bell Casting is casting Multi-Generational Latinx/Hispanic families for a national commercial.

items.text:
There isn’t a handbook for raising a young performer but there is a lot to learn along the way! 🎭

Whether your child is attending their very first audition or already has professional experience, the industry can feel exciting, rewarding... and sometimes overwhelming.

That’s why we’ve put together a few reminders we believe every parent should know.

✨ Success isn’t just about booking the job.
✨ Keeping profiles and materials up to date matters.
✨ Most importantly, helping your child continue to love performing is the greatest success of all.

Behind every young performer is a parent, guardian or family member cheering them on, driving them to rehearsals, learning new industry terms and celebrating every milestone, big or small!

We hope this carousel helps you feel a little more informed and a little more supported on that journey.

💬 What’s one piece of advice you wish you’d been given when your child started performing?

📌 Save this post for whenever you need a reminder, and share it with another parent navigating the industry.

COMMENT ‘SELF TAPE GUIDE’ and we will send you our free guide 🤩

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of child and text that says 'KEEP YOUR CHILD'S PROFILE UP TO DATE. Headshots. Height. Playing age. Skills. → Children grow quickly and their profile should grow with them too!'
May be a graphic of text that says 'chorey SUCCESS ISN'T MEASURED → BY BOOKINGS. Confidence. Resilience. Creativity. Enjoyment. These are are just as important.'
May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎cho Chi chorry pips ciees יחות 4 THINGS EVERY PARENT OF A YOUNG PERFORMER SHOULD KNOW cherrypipsacting.co.uk‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUR CHILD'S AGENT IS YOUR TEAMMATE. Keep them informed about: .Holidays •School commitments → •New skills Appearance changes Communication helps them submit your child for the right opportunities.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'LEARN HOW to SELF-TAPE. SELF- ΓΑΡΕ. Many first-round auditions now happen from home, so creating a simple self-tape setup is a valuable skill. Message us and we will send you our FREE SELF-TAPE GUIDE for for and young performers. parents'

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m Nanda, a Berlin-based Fashion, Beauty & Portrait Photographer with over 15 years of experience. I’m currently looking for opportunities in Photography, Photo Retouching/Editing, or Social Media Content Management anywhere in Germany.

I have about 4 months left on my Opportunity Card (Chancenkarte) and will be applying for an extension at the end of this month. A job in my field would also help me transition to a German work visa.

At the moment, I’m working part-time in a German restaurant while actively searching for a creative role.

If you know of any openings or can refer me, I’d truly appreciate your support.

🌐 Portfolio: https://nandasphotography.com

📸 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nanda.prophotographer

✨ Fashion & Beauty: https://www.instagram.com/eurofashion.nanda

Thank you so much! 🙏

items.text:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia

- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu

Cześć! Do serialu Trudne Sprawy, realizowanego we Wrocławiu została jeszcze  rola do obsadzenia:

1. Rafał Poręba (34 l.) - mąż Michaliny 
SCENY: 4 (OFF), 12 (OFF), 20, 22 (OFF), 22A, 24
Wygląd: pozornie sympatyczny, dobrze zbudowany mężczyzna. 
Szczegóły: bije żonę. Na zewnątrz sprawia wrażenie czarującego partnera.
 
Terminy zdjęć 18,19,20 lipca. Wymagane doświadczenie. Najlepiej osoby z Wrocławia lub okolic. 

Dla osób spoza Wrocławia poza wynagrodzeniem za role, bukuję hotel oraz zwracam za koszty transportu w jedna i druga stronę.
Wszystko płatne gotówką na planie po zakończeniu zdjęć.
Zainteresowane osoby proszę o koment. Pod postem, lub o wiadomość prywatną. 

Zgłoszenia można także wysyłać na e-mail: julia.dzialek@polotmedia.pl
W temacie proszę wpisać Casting rola:....
A w treści wiadomości należy zamieścić: imię, nazwisko, numer telefonu, wiek, wzrost, miasto, jakie doświadczenie na planie, aktualne zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetki, demo/scenki aktorskie.

items.text:
*Casting for an upcoming student short film*

Looking for actress aged 28 - 35 to play a doctor in a hospital. One day of filming in a hospital located in Finchley.

Character: Dr Elizabeth Gilbert 

A short summary of our project

Set during the COVID -19 pandemic, There Is Still Hope follows Sarah, a doctor struggling to rebuild her life after the loss of her partner. While balancing the relentless demands of the hospital with raising her 12 year old daughter, Sarah dedicates herself to caring for her patients even as she quietly wrestles with grief and uncertainty. Her outlook begins to change when she forms a profound connection with an elderly patient receiving end-of-life care. Despite facing her final chapter, the patient approaches each day with warmth, and an enduring sense of hope that challenges Sarah’s increasingly fragile view of the world. A realistic and emotionally resonant drama, the film explores grief, resilience, and the transformative power of human connection.

London

Food and travel paid for.

Interested? Email melissa.rienda@hotmail.com and rosiepaulinejones@gmail.com

topComments.text:
Susan Regan Assoc Cipd
Caron April
This might be a good call for one of you.

items.text:
🎬 FREE AUDITION LOG FOR ACTORS
I created a simple audition log that I thought some of you might find useful.

When I first moved to LA, I had 80 auditions in my first three months. Keeping a log made it much easier to stay organised, track my progress, and remember which casting directors I’d read for.

It’s an easy way to keep track of:
• The project
• The type of role
• The audition date
• The casting director
• Whether you got a callback or booked the role
• Notes and feedback
• How many auditions you’re actually getting

I find it’s much easier to spot patterns and see your progress when everything is in one place.

And it’s FREE.

If you’d like a copy:

1. Comment AUDITION below.
2. Send me a DM.

I’ll send it over. 😊

items.text:
Hi everyone - Channel 4's HANDCUFFED is back and looking for people to take part!  

If you have strong convictions, are passionate about what you believe in and have something to say, we want to hear from you!

 

How long could you survive being handcuffed to someone who sees the world differently to you? 

 

You’ll have the chance to share your opinions, influence someone else’s perspective, and win a share of £100,000. 

To apply, visit ww.handcuffedcasting.com

items.text:
Hello!
My names David and i’m based in the northamptonshire area. I have just completed a Level 3 extended diploma in musical theatre and I am taking a gap year before heading off to The Urdang Academy. 

I’m looking for smaller jobs in musical theatre or dance. I have experience in choreographing (Hair the musical teen edition and Contemporary dance teaching) and performing (Jane Seymour in six and mike costa in a chorus line) 

I’m 5’8, Blue/green eyes, Brown hair and a playing age of 16-21. 

Thank you in advance.

topComments.text: If you want a playing age of 16 I would have some shots minus make up in younger clothing as this shots makes you look older and its definitely a bonus to be able to play down

Would deffo reccomend getting on lots of Facebook casting pages especially local ones, follow casting directors and companies on insta etc! OpenAuditions is good to check in on too. 
Secret farm in moggerhanger is casting for their Halloween event, Wellingborough panto auditions are this weekend too, might be worth reaching out to them!!

items.text:
🎭 Calling all actors!

I've just launched my Actor's Planner a digital planner created by an actor, for actors.

If you're looking for a way to stay organised throughout audition season, this planner includes:

✨ Goal-setting & vision boards
🎬 Self-tape checklists
📝 Character preparation sheets
📅 Audition & callback trackers
⭐ Booking trackers & reflection pages
📇 Fillable industry contact pages

I created this because I know how much there is to juggle as an actor, and I wanted one place to keep everything organised and help us feel more prepared for every opportunity.

If this sounds like something that would help you, I'd love for you to check it out. 
Here’s the link 
🔗 https://shop.beacons.ai/aaa.productions/63876ea7-f6c6-43b7-8c90-8bfc491006c8

 Thank you for your support! ❤️

#Actors #ActingCareer #ActorLife #SelfTape #Auditions

items.text:
✨Lights. Music. Magic. We’re casting K-Pop Demon Hunters tributes! ✨ 

Do you have the energy, stage presence and performance skills to bring a high impact K-Pop act to life? 

Since the launch of our K-Pop Demon Hunters tribute act - it has been a HUGE hit!!! From more intimate smaller parties, to large scale events and festivals…even beyond the UK! 💜 

Due to such high demand, we are now looking for more performers to join our K-Pop team… a high energy, professionally choreographed act performing across the UK and beyond. 

We are looking for performers who:
✨Are age 18+
✨Are able to authentically and respectfully represent the characters heritage
✨Are reliable, professional and committed 
✨Have great stage presence and energy 
✨Dancing and singing abilities are a bonus (but not essential as all training is provided)
✨A valid UK passport is required for any work beyond the UK 

About the roll:
✨Paid performance opportunities 
✨Competitive rates of pay
✨Full training provided 
✨Events include birthday parties, private events, on stage performances, festivals and much more 
✨High quality costumes provided 
✨Be part of a supportive team 

Must be UK based and able to travel

This is not just a character roll - it’s a high energy act making dreams come true 💖💫 

If this sounds like you, we would love to hear from you! 

To apply, please email:

Wishuponastareventsltd@gmail.com

Or message us directly on Facebook 

Wish Upon a Star Events

We can’t wait to hear from you! 💜

#Kpop #performing #Acting #Dancing #Singing #Makingmagicalmoments #wishuponastar #dreams #casting #castingcall #hiring #magical #events

items.previewDescription: Known for: When Sadness Lingers, Chow Kit, Prince of the City

sharedPost.text:
🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

💡 Value Highlight: Learn directly from a DP/Director whose professional rate is $1,500/day 

this 4-session online workshop gives you real film-level expertise at a fraction of that cost!
Price on enquiry.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype
"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name
🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.
🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach).

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill
📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):
Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."
The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"
Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.
Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.
Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call
📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable
🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point
📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew
🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.
Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)
🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape
📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:
Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.
Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.
Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:
Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.
Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux
📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

Final Performance (Day 4):
Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?
This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:
mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com
Let’s create something unforgettable.

📣 **Parents, considering home education from September? **
***Feeling nervous? Not sure where to start?***

Hi 👋🏼
We are Josh & Aimee, owners of Swan Tutoring! An online, flexible education platform for home educating families 🏡

In August** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨ designed for those who are considering home education and are new to it, and those who have been home educating for a while!** You can try our engaging online classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

sharedPost.text:
Verdient ist verdient.

Gestern, am 08. Juli 2026, fanden in den Berliner und Brandenburger Grundschulen zahlreiche Abschlussveranstaltungen zur feierlichen Übergabe der Zeugnisse für die Sechstklässler statt, die ab dem nächsten Schuljahr 2026/ 2027 an die Oberschulen wechseln werden.
 
Zweiundzwanzig glückliche Kinder der Klasse 6a einer Lichtenberger Schule hatten besonderes Glück, denn sie fanden zum Abschied in ihren Zeugnismappen das erste Album der Synthi-Pop-Band BEYOND OBSESSION "Listen, Learn And Speak".

Wie kam es dazu ?

Durch Beziehungen hörten Nils und Marco von einer Klasse, die öfter während längerer Pausen heimlich auf dem Smartboard Videos der Band öffnete, sich immer wieder ein Video-Post des Fanclubs ansahen, bis etliche Schüler es auswendig nachsprechen konnten, zu "In My Blood" tanzten oder Beyond Obsession-Melodien im Unterricht vor sich hin sangen oder gar im öffentlichen Personennahverkehr fremde Menschen auf die Synthi-Band aufmerksam machten.

Beide Künstler fanden dies so witzig, dass sie nicht nur jedem Kind dieser Schulklasse spontan eine handsignierte CD schenkten, sondern obendrein eine namentliche Widmung hinzufügten.

An einem Sonntagnachmittag überreichte der Keyboarder Marco Bartz den CD-Karton an den Fanclub, der die Tonträger dann am Montag in die Schule brachte.

Nachdem am Abschiedstag den vielen Gästen in der dicht gefüllten Turnhalle von der Vorgeschichte der CD-Geschenke berichtet worden war, klatschten alle Kinder, Eltern, Großeltern und die anwesenden Lehrkräfte und Erzieher spontan Beifall.

Tom Meeloo

🆕🆕🆕🥳🥳🥳
Stage & Screen
Theater trifft Kamera 

Unser neuer Schauspieworkshop für Jugendliche im Alter von 12-20 Jahren lädt dazu ein die Arbeit als Schauspieler*in auf der Bühne und vor der Kamera gleichermaßen kennenzulernen. 
Wir tauchen voll ein in beide Welten und drehen unseren ersten eigenen Kurzfilm. 🎥🥳

Sei dabei und begebe dich in das Abenteuer auf der Bühne und vor der Kamera zu stehen und finde heraus, was dir am meisten Spaß macht!🥳

Jetzt buchen! 🥳🥳🥳

📅03. und 04. August jeweils 11-15 Uhr 
📍Hafencity Hamburg 

Anmeldung und alle Infos unter:
www.claract.de 

Bei Fragen, meldet euch jederzeit sehr gerne bei mir! 

Ich freue mich auf euch! ☀️🥳🏝️🍦🐝

#ferien #schauspiel #hamburg #actress #actor

items.text:
Letzte Chance dabei zu sein!
Offenes Jurycasting im Kloster Graefenthal in Goch

Die Suche nach neuen Talenten geht weiter!

Du begeisterst mit deiner Stimme, deiner Tanzperformance, Artistik, Comedy oder einem anderen außergewöhnlichen Talent? 

Dann nutze jetzt die Gelegenheit und präsentiere dein Können unserer Jury. 

Ganz gleich, ob Anfänger oder Bühnenerfahrung wir freuen uns auf alle Talente.

Jetzt: Sonntag, 12. Juli 2026

12:00 bis 18:00 Uhr

Kloster Graefenthal

Maasstraße 48–50

47574 Goch

Bitte bringe Folgendes mit:

• Gute Laune und Freude an deinem Auftritt

• Bei Gesang, Tanz oder Comedy: einen USB-Stick mit deinem Playback

• Musiker und Bands: eigene Instrumente, Verstärker und benötigte Anschlüsse

• Artisten und Akrobaten: alle für den Auftritt erforderlichen Requisiten

• Minderjährige können nur in Begleitung eines Erziehungsberechtigten teilnehmen.

Spontan teilnehmen? Kein Problem!

Eine vorherige Anmeldung ist nicht erforderlich. Du kannst einfach vorbeikommen und dich direkt vor Ort für das Jurycasting anmelden.

Wer sich seinen Platz bereits im Voraus sichern möchte, kann sich bequem online registrieren.

Online-Bewerbung & weitere Informationen:

www.evctalentcastingshow.de/bewerbung

Kennst du jemanden mit einem besonderen Talent?

Dann markiere die Person in den Kommentaren oder teile diesen Beitrag. 

Vielleicht beginnt genau an diesem Sonntag der Weg bis ins große Finale der EVC Talent Casting Show 2026.

Wir freuen uns auf einen abwechslungsreichen Casting-Tag und viele beeindruckende Talente!

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**20-21-22-25 lipca**

**Stawki: 140 – 280 zł gotówką po planie**

** **

Zapraszam na plany nowego serialu dla jednej z telewizji. Jesteśmy w temacie futbolu. I daleko od fair play ;).

Tym razem gramy sekwencje stadionowe przez kilka dni na stadionie w Ząbkach. Zapewniamy transport z Warszawy.

 

Kogo szukam?

 

**- KIBICE –** tzw. pikniki czyli wszyscy od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 60 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**

**- ULTRASI – **kobiety i mężczyźni od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 50 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**. Spośród tej grupy reżyser będzie wybierał młodych mężczyzn do kontynuacji i do epizodów. **Stawka dla osób z kontynuacją 180 zł. Dla epizodów 250 zł.**

**- GNIAZDOWY / BĘBNIARZE –** z prawdziwego zdarzenia. Tu trzeba wiedzieć co robić. **Stawka 280 zł gotówką.**

** **

Do przydzielenia będą również role POLICJANTÓW Z PREWENCJI i PORZĄDKOWYCH.  **Stawka 140 zł gotówką.**

 

Zgłaszać można się na 1 dzień lub wszystkie 4 dni.

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień / dni**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

items.summary:
**WARSZAWA**

**20-21-22-25 lipca**

**Stawki: 140 – 280 zł gotówką po planie**

** **

Zapraszam na plany nowego serialu dla jednej z telewizji. Jesteśmy w temacie futbolu. I daleko od fair play ;).

Tym razem gramy sekwencje stadionowe przez kilka dni na stadionie w Ząbkach. Zapewniamy transport z Warszawy.

 

Kogo szukam?

 

**- KIBICE –** tzw. pikniki czyli wszyscy od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 60 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**

**- ULTRASI – **kobiety i mężczyźni od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 50 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**. Spośród tej grupy reżyser będzie wybierał młodych mężczyzn do kontynuacji i do epizodów. **Stawka dla osób z kontynuacją 180 zł. Dla epizodów 250 zł.**

**- GNIAZDOWY / BĘBNIARZE –** z prawdziwego zdarzenia. Tu trzeba wiedzieć co robić. **Stawka 280 zł gotówką.**

** **

Do przydzielenia będą również role POLICJANTÓW Z PREWENCJI i PORZĄDKOWYCH.  **Stawka 140 zł gotówką.**

 

Zgłaszać można się na 1 dzień lub wszystkie 4 dni.

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień / dni**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka.

sharedPost.text:
Panie i Panowie z Trójmiasta 🎞️📽️
Zapraszamy Was na plan filmowy!
Zagrać może każdy.
Przenosimy się w czasie i gramy lata 80’.
Poszukuje kobiet i mężczyzn jako statystów.
Nagrania :
12,13,14 lipca 
Osoby naturalne od lat 16 bez limitu. 
Wynagrodzenie 110 zl netto. 

📩Zgłoszenia: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL Koniecznie dodaj AKTUALNE ZDJĘCIE, gdzie dobrze widać fryzurę, imie, nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu.

Uwaga! Osoby,które zgłaszały się wcześniej przejmujemy projekt, proszę się odezwać do nas ponownie.

items.text:
7/8 Casting
UPDATE: Just sent options to the director, thank you again everyone!

Had another person cancel today so looking for background replacement asap!

Role: 50+ female church goer 

Location: 90037

Call time: likely between 10am and noon but depends based on what time they wrap tomorrow night. 

Wardrobe: 3 Colorful, Sundays best options

Pay: $135/8

I just a need photo of you to submit to the director. PM me. I’ll also need email and phone number for the call sheet

topComments.text: Love to do it ...but Iam already booked with you ...and I not a female ...lol

items.text:
We are casting Spanish-speaking actors for A Distancia, an independent Spanish-language short film filming in Los Angeles this fall.

We are currently seeking performers for:

• Leonardo (Male, 20–25)
• Camila (Female, 20–25)

Please swipe through the images below for the full character breakdowns.

Compensation: Deferred based on the successful completion of our crowdfunding campaign. Meals, IMDb credit, and a digital copy of the completed film will be provided.

🎭 Apply at: byosiel.com/casting

📩 Questions: casting@byosiel.com

We look forward to reviewing your submission!

As he chases a better life, he begins to understand the hidden cost of the sacrifices he made. Details: Fluent in Spanish Based in the Los Angeles area Submit via byosiel.com/casting byosiel. casting contact casting casting@byosiel.com for any questions'

Drawn to his determination, she becomes the first person who makes him feel at home. Details: Fluent in Spanish Based in the Los Angeles area Submit via byosiel byosiel.com/casting com/ contact casting casting@byosiel.com for any any questions'

items.text:
Hi everybody,

Does anyone have any movies that are not under active distribution? If so, we hopefully want to interest you in joining the platform. 

FLINK was created to help independent films continue finding audiences long after their festival run or theatrical release cycle has ended. The platform provides a home for films that may no longer have active distribution, as well as titles that are difficult to access through current streaming services and traditional distribution channels.

Filmmakers retain full ownership, set their own pricing and territorial availability, and can remove their films from the platform at any time.

The platform is entirely free to join, with audiences purchasing directly from filmmakers.

We are officially launching live to the public on 21 July 2026. 

If this sounds of interest, I'd be delighted to send over our information pack and answer any questions you may have. Send me an email on klara@flink.movie.

thank you))

topComments.text: I have a movie that was never released but I’m not the director

items.text:
🎬 **Casting Call for Short Film — Filming in Vancouver**
## 📽️ Project Information
* **Title**: COUNTERFEIT
* **Production Company**: Reroute Films
* **Producers / Casting**: Junhyuk Suh, Donghun Kang
* **Project Type**: Short Film
* **Union Status**: Non-Union
* **Student Film**: No
## 💰 Compensation
* **$100/day, based on a 10-hour day**
* Meals and craft services provided
## 🎭 Audition
* **Format**: Self-Tape
## 🎥 Shoot Dates
* **Mid-October 2026**
* **Expected shoot duration**: 2–3 days
* **Location**: Vancouver and surrounding areas
## 📅 Submission Deadline

**Saturday, August 15, 2026**
## 📧 How to Apply

Please submit your application to the email below:

**📩 ****[reroutefilms@gmail.com](mailto:reroutefilms@gmail.com)**

**Email Subject Line**
> 

Your Name - Role You Are Applying For

**Please Include**
* Headshot or profile photo
* Resume
* Demo reel, if available

✅ **No acting experience required.**
✅ **Non-actors and beginners are welcome to apply.**
# 🎬 About the Film

**COUNTERFEIT** is an emotional drama about **Suyeon**, a young Korean woman struggling financially. Wanting to buy a meaningful birthday gift for her younger sister, she decides to purchase a secondhand luxury jacket. However, when she discovers that the jacket may be counterfeit, she is forced to face a difficult choice.

The film will focus on quiet, realistic performances, capturing the emotional details of the characters and their relationships with subtlety and care.
# 👤 Roles
## 🌿 Suyeon — Lead Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 20–30

A young Korean immigrant living on her own while struggling financially.

Suyeon is quiet, hardworking, and observant. She moves through the world more by watching than speaking. Although she rarely expresses her emotions openly, she carries a deep love and sense of responsibility for her younger sister.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and restrained acting
* Strong subtle facial expressions and non-verbal emotional performance
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 🌸 Yeonsu — Supporting Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 13–17

Suyeon’s younger sister.

Yeonsu is warm and bright. She may not fully understand the weight of what her older sister is carrying, but she has an honest and innocent presence.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and unforced acting
* Ability to portray a comfortable, believable sisterly chemistry
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 👩 Middle-Aged Korean Woman — Supporting Role
* **Female**
* **Age Range**: 40–50

A woman selling a secondhand luxury jacket.

She is polite, but also firm about her position. She is not a simple villain, but a character with layered humanity and complexity.

**Looking for:**
* Natural and realistic acting
* Ability to portray subtle emotional balance
* Korean language ability preferred, but not required
## 📢 We’d Love to Hear From You
* Korean and Korean-Canadian actors are welcome to apply
* No acting experience required
* We welcome anyone interested in natural, realistic performance

For inquiries and submissions:
📩 **[reroutefilms@gmail.com](mailto:reroutefilms@gmail.com)**

topComments.text: You have to pay minimum wage.

🎬 DWAYNE JOHNSON MOVIE CASTING! Be in 'Lizard Music' filming in Georgia! ✨👇

Ready to share the screen with a Hollywood legend? 🌟 An unbelievable new opportunity just hit the casting board, and production needs YOU to bring the energy to a massive sports scene! 🤯🎥

Rose Locke Casting is officially looking for Background Actors to portray family members at a Little League baseball game in the upcoming feature film 'Lizard Music,' starring Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson! Filming right in Brooks, Georgia, this is your ultimate chance to get on a major movie set, cheer from the bleachers, and secure a solid paycheck. Grab your sunscreen, bring your best stadium energy, and claim your spot in the stands! 🎫🔥

The Breakdown:
🎬 Project: Feature Film 'Lizard Music'
💰 Rate: $196/12 hrs
📍 Location: Brooks, Georgia 🍑
🎭 Seeking: all ethnicities

How to Apply:
Do not let this incredible on-set experience pass you by! ⏰ Tag your Georgia acting squad, share this to your story, and apply RIGHT NOW at: 👉 projectcasting.com/jobs 🔗

items.title: Tiv people una don start again.

items.text:
An actors resume is not the same
Did you know one of the biggest mistakes new actors make is with their resume!
When asked what to do to start acting they are told to get a headshot and create a resume. 

The problem is that an actors resume and a resume for a job are not the same. 

What do you think should go on an actors resume  and what do you think should be avoided ?

topComments.text: Chat Gbt put mine together. It missed out all the dates.  I am confused. I could do with seeing examples but where do you find any examples.
Heard no background which sucks because that's still experience on a set. Free training ig

items.title: CASTING CALL ! 💜

items.text: Hello, my name is Amy Bradford I’m 19 years old (20 in a month) currently based in Darlington however relocating to Birmingham for university in September. Wondering if there are any opportunities around this areas. I have a background in dance and have been in musical theatre and singing lessons since the age of 8. Thank you in advance for any opportunities.

topComments.text: Hi Amy. Sign on to Casting Calls UK. If you can afford it, it’s worth getting the paid version but you still get all the jobs submitted and can work around the showreel hosting by using we.cam or similar to submit your reels. Do you have any footage of you acting? Collect it if you’re proud of it and make a show reel, just in case someone asks for one at short notice. Sign on at Supporting Artiste agencies (extras) such as Phoenix, Creative Casting, Universal Extras and others. Be prepared to work at short notice and keep your profile up to date. UVE is a good one for policing the quality of the images you use in your profile; they just reject them if they’re not good enough, which is helpful. You will never know what the casting director is really after, despite what the agencies say; so just be persistent, make sure you have notifications set and respond in good time to any calls, so they can put your name forward to the casting director when you fit the brief. If you are asked to send a self-tape, read the instructions carefully and film yourself in landscape format. Again, you never know exactly what the casting director is after, so just interpret the instructions as best you can. Dress the part too, as close as your wardrobe allows. Good luck!

Darsteller:innen für Werbedreh in Berlin und Düsseldorf
Für eine hochwertige Werbeproduktion suchen wir 20 Darsteller:innen im Alter von 18 bis 45 Jahren.

WICHTIG: Ihr müsst wirklich aus Berlin oder Düsseldorf kommen!

Drehort: Berlin

Drehtermin: 05.08.

Drehort: Düsseldorf 

Drehtermin: 03.08.

Einsatzzeit: Maximal 6 Stunden pro Person.

Gage: 1.750 € inklusive Nutzungsrechte und Reisekosten.

Nutzungsrechte:

- Digital

- OOH

- VoD

- Online Paid

- All Print

- Deutschland

- Laufzeit: 1 Jahr

Rechnungsstellung ist möglich.

Worauf wir achten

Wir suchen Menschen,

- die sympathisch sind.

- die glaubwürdig wirken.

- die authentisch sprechen – es muss nicht alles perfektes Hochdeutsch sein.

- die eine Macher-Ausstrahlung haben (nicht Macker). Macher:innen sind Menschen, die den Mut haben, Dinge anzupacken.

- die Optimismus und Aufbruch vermitteln.

- die Emotionen zulassen.

- die neugierig und offen sind.

- die Lust haben, über das Thema Altersvorsorge zu sprechen – menschlich, authentisch und echt.

Wir suchen keine Expert:innen.

Fachkenntnisse sind nicht erforderlich. Wir möchten keine auswendig gelernten Sätze oder werblichen Verkaufstexte hören. Uns interessieren echte Gedanken, ehrliche Meinungen und authentische Menschen.

Bitte bewerbt euch auf Kiezkomparsen.de. Füllt ein vollständiges Profil aus und schreibt mir eine DM mit eurem Vor- und Nachnamen, wenn ihr euch beworben habt. Danach bekommt ihr dann alle weiteren Infos.

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich suche jemanden, der professionelle **Model-Digitals / Polaroids** von mir fotografieren kann – idealerweise im Studio mit cleanem Tageslicht-Look. Die Bilder sind für meine Sedcard und Bewerbungen bei Modelagenturen.

**TFP wäre super**, alternativ zahle ich auch gerne eine faire Aufwandsentschädigung.

Falls jemand Interesse hat oder jemanden empfehlen kann, freue ich mich über eine Nachricht. 😊

⸻

📸** Looking for a photographer for model digitals / polaroids**

Hi everyone! 👋

I’m looking for a photographer to shoot a set of professional **model digitals / polaroids**, ideally in a studio with a clean natural daylight look. The photos will be used for my modeling portfolio and agency applications.

**TFP would be great**, but I’m also happy to pay a reasonable fee if preferred.

Feel free to message me if you’re interested or know someone who might be a good fit. Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Ava Frommell, and I'm the producer of **BROADCASTING 101**, a proof-of-concept television pilot filming in Bellmore, NY next week. Due to a last-minute casting change, we're urgently seeking an actor to play **RANDY FRIEDMAN**, one of our ensemble lead roles.

**Logline:**

In this mockumentary-style workplace comedy, a naively optimistic teen filmmaker leads a chaotic high school broadcasting program through constant production disasters, determined to prove that a group of misfit students can create something meaningful.

**ROLE: RANDY FRIEDMAN**
40s (Late 30s-Late 40s), Male, White, A Social Studies teacher and GCTV’s faculty advisor, though he functions more as a friend to the crew than a traditional authority figure. He is a gay, sports-obsessed Long Island staple with enough life experience and connections to fix almost any problem. He cares deeply about the program’s image—and his own—but his heart is always with the students. ENSEMBLE LEAD

**Project Details:**

Union: Non-Union
Rate: Copy/Credit/Meals Provided
Shoot Location: Bellmore, New York (Greater NYC area)
Shoot Window: July 14th-18th

If interested, please send an email to **pbtscasting@gmail.com** with your headshot or recent photo and a 60 second slate including your full name, height, confirmation of non-union status, confirmation of availability for full date range, confirmation that you’re able to work as a Long Island local, and talk about something you’re passionate about.

Please feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit. We'd love to hear from performers of all experience levels, and we're hoping to cast this role as soon as possible.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — LOS ANGELES LOCAL HIRE

We are currently casting the lead roles of **Cris** and **Rosa** for *Pregnant by a Demon*, a 30-minute scripted mockumentary comedy pilot shooting in Los Angeles.

**CRIS — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 18–21. Must be 18+ and able to believably portray 16. Cris is sharp, beautiful, restless, and dryly funny. She dreams of becoming more independent and escaping the chaos of her family, but beneath the sarcasm, eye rolls, and teenage defiance, she feels everything deeply. She is caught between two worlds, two languages, and two versions of herself. The role includes one brief kiss with the character of Mike.
**Works 4 days | Rate: $1,500 total**

**ROSA — LEAD**
**Hispanic** woman, 45–65. Must be able to portray an older family matriarch through styling. Rosa is the family’s sweet-faced, sharp-tongued matriarch—warm and loving one moment, terrifying with a candle and a curse the next. She believes she is spiritually gifted, deeply misunderstood, and absolutely right about everything. Dramatic, nosy, loving, superstitious, and impossible to ignore, Rosa uses guilt, prayer, black magic, and perfectly timed insults to keep her family in line.
**Works approximately 3.5 days | Rate: $1,000 flat**

**Shoot dates:** July 20–25, 2026
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA vicinity
**Local hire only**
**Rates are all-inclusive and firm**

**This project is non-union**
**Submission deadline:** July 13, 2026

Please email your **headshot, résumé, and reel** to **sheela@reigncasting.com** with the role name in the subject line.

Please **only** submit if you fit the role requirements.

Please only submit for Cris if you truly look like you can pass for high school. Submissions that do not match the requested criteria will be deleted.

**** PAID CASTING NOTICE ****

Towers Film LV Productions is seeking a talented actress for its upcoming indie feature film.

Title: Towers

Tagline: Love is the signal that crosses every dimension

Synopsis: After their mother mysteriously disappears, two teenage sisters embark on an unforgettable journey that leads them to an ancient alien secret hidden beneath the Nevada desert.

Shoot Dates: August 1-2, 2026

Location: Las Vegas, NV

Shoot Length: 1.5 days

Rate: $200 flat

Union Status: Non-Union

ROLE:

PETRA 16yr (Supporting)

Female, 18-24 max age. Think Dustin from Stranger Things - super smart, funny, and witty. Comedic chops a must. Ethnicity: Asian, Pacific Islander or mixed heritage. 

Talent must be willing to work as a Las Vegas local hire. No travel or housing will be provided.

TO SUBMIT

Please send the following to: towerslvfilm@gmail.com

* Headshot

* Resume

* Acting reel or performance clips (required)

Selected applicants will be invited to submit a video audition.

American Playlist Theater is bringing The Holiday Radio Theater Extravaganza to the Garrison Playhouse in Rollinsford, New Hampshire, and we're looking for talented actors, musicians, and filmmakers/videographers to join our holiday production team!

This production features:

  Three original holiday radio plays

  Two holiday readings

  Live sound effects

  Live music

  Plenty of laughs

  A whole lot of Christmas spirit!

Performance Dates:

  December 4–6 & December 11–13, 2026

 Auditions

  Wednesday, August 26, 2026

  6:00 PM – 8:30 PM

 Garrison Playhouse, Rollinsford, NH

 No radio theater experience? No problem! 

If you love storytelling, music, or capturing the magic on camera, we'd love to meet you.

Interested? Contact Sean Sullivan at:

POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY NON PROFIT

14.07-18.07 WARSZAWA, SKIERNIEWICE

Krótki metraż z humorem opowiada historię stereotypu ojca postawionego w realiach systemu kaucyjnego. Film przedstawia powstałe przez zachowanie ojca problemy rodzinne oraz wynikającą z tego relację, zdanego na siebie rodzeństwa.

Do etiudy do portfolio do Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukiwanych jest 

czterech MĘŻCZYZN W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli ojca, dwóch jego kolegów i sąsiada

dwie KOBIETY W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli sąsiadki ojca oraz żony jednego z jego znajomych

DZIEWCZYNA W WIEKU 19-24 LAT, do roli siostry

dwóch CHŁOPAKÓW W WIEKU 16-20 LAT do roli brata i jego znajomego

MAŁY CHŁOPIEC W WIEKU 8-12 LAT do roli dziecka spacerującego na chodniku

Proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej, na telefon: 607075035, lub na maila slawinskiantoni23@gmail.com

🎵 WARSZAWA | 30.06 | próby NOWEGO PROGRAMU MUZYCZNEGO 🎵

Szukamy mężczyzn do udziału w próbach kamerowych nowego programu muzycznego!

🎤 Wciel się w uczestnika jednej z drużyn i poczuj dreszczyk emocji, biorąc udział w muzycznym teleturnieju. Twoim zadaniem będzie odgadywanie utworów i piosenek.

💰 Wynagrodzenie: 120 zł (płatne po realizacji).

📧 Zgłoszenia: ludzie@unagimedia.pl

📌 W tytule wiadomości wpisz: H30

W treści wiadomości podaj:

imię i nazwisko,

wiek,

numer telefonu,

zdjęcie portretowe.

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń! 🎶

items.text:
🛑 ⚠️ DANCE AUDITION — ARU DELL’ARTE DANCE COMPANY 2026–2027 SEASON

Seeking female-identifying, male-identifying, and nonbinary artists for lead roles and ensemble positions.

Strong classical/contemporary and partnering skills required.

Season repertoire includes contemporary works, ballet, avant-garde physical theatre, and dance films.

Rehearsals begin in mid-August 2026. Open to DMV-based artists only.

To be considered, send your CV, headshot, and current dance reel to:

[info@aru-dell-arte.com](mailto:info@aru-dell-arte.com)

Attendance by invitation only.

items.text:
🎬 SCRIPTWRITERS WANTED LENICO PRODUCTIONS ✍️
I’m currently developing a zero budget independent film based in Liverpool and I’m looking for passionate scriptwriters who want to collaborate and help bring an original story to life.

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain experience, and be part of an ambitious independent production from the ground up.

What you’ll gain from being involved:

✍️ Official writing credit on the final production

🎬 See your ideas developed into a real film project

📁 Build your writing portfolio and screenplay experience

🤝 Collaborate with actors, directors and other creatives

🌟 Gain valuable experience within an independent film production

📽️ Potential opportunities to work on future Lenico Productions projects

🎭 Have your storytelling showcased on screen

I’m looking for writers interested in:

🎭 Crime

🎬 Drama

⚡ Thriller

🧟 Horror

😂 Comedy

📺 TV & Film

Whether you’re experienced or just starting out, if you’ve got ideas and enjoy storytelling, I’d love to hear from you.

📧 Email: cheethamlennie55@gmail.com

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy, or you know someone who might be interested, please get in touch or share this post.

🎥 Let’s create something together.

#Scriptwriter #Screenwriter #Liverpool #IndependentFilm #ZeroBudgetFilm #Filmmaking #Screenplay #WritersWanted #LenicoProductions

topComments.text: Hi Lennie, are you looking for shorts or full length scripts? I'll email.
Have you got any deadlines or writing blocks in mind?

items.summary:
🎬 SCRIPTWRITERS WANTED LENICO PRODUCTIONS ✍️
I’m currently developing a zero budget independent film based in Liverpool and I’m looking for passionate scriptwriters who want to collaborate and help bring an original story to life.

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain experience, and be part of an ambitious independent production from the ground up.

What you’ll gain from being involved:

✍️ Official writing credit on the final production

🎬 See your ideas developed into a real film project

📁 Build your writing portfolio and screenplay experience

🤝 Collaborate with actors, directors and other creatives

🌟 Gain valuable experience within an independent film production

📽️ Potential opportunities to work on future Lenico Productions projects

🎭 Have your storytelling showcased on screen

I’m looking for writers interested in:

🎭 Crime

🎬 Drama

⚡ Thriller

🧟 Horror

😂 Comedy

📺 TV & Film

Whether you’re experienced or just starting out, if you’ve got ideas and enjoy storytelling, I’d love to hear from you.

📧 Email: cheethamlennie55@gmail.com

If this sounds like something you’d enjoy, or you know someone who might be interested, please get in touch or share this post.

🎥 Let’s create something together.

#Scriptwriter #Screenwriter #Liverpool #IndependentFilm #ZeroBudgetFilm #Filmmaking #Screenplay #WritersWanted #LenicoProductions

sharedPost.text:
Dylan Has Autism and Is Chasing His Dream of Becoming a Full-Time Actor ❤️ Please Watch His Story

Dylan has autism, but that has never stopped him from pursuing his dream of becoming a full-time actor. Every audition, every role, and every opportunity brings him one step closer to achieving what he's worked so hard for.

This video shares Dylan's journey, his determination, and the passion that drives him every single day. If his story inspires you, the best way you can support him is by watching the full video, leaving a comment, and sharing it with others.

Thank you for taking a few minutes to support Dylan's dream. ❤️

#Autism #AutismAcceptance #AutismAwareness #Actor #acting

items.text:
🌟 *BIG NEWS! Welcome Emma Jane to Majestic Elite Associates!* Emma has been with Majestic doing some amazing choreography and now back with us for something spectacular! *Starting back in September*

We're incredibly excited to announce that Emma Jane will now be taking over our Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) programme as our lead choreographer!

Bringing a wealth of professional industry experience, creativity and passion, Emma is ready to inspire, challenge and develop the next generation of elite dancers.

Alongside Emma, meet Summer-Joules & Eva, two of our amazing MEA dancers who represent the standard, dedication and talent we're looking for.

✨ Could YOU be our next Majestic Elite Associate?

Expressions of Interest are 

NOW OPEN!

Majestic Elite Associates (MEA) is our audition or invitation-only elite training programme for dancers who want to perform, compete and train at the highest level.

*12 years and over - younger with exceptions of strong dancers*

✨ What you'll receive:

🏆 Elite dance & performance training
💜 Weekly inspiration and mentoring from Emma Jane
🥇 Competition opportunities, including Dance World Cup
🎭 Theatre, TV and live performance opportunities
🌍 Industry connections across the UK & Europe with the aim for paid work
🎓 Accredited examinations with UCAS points available
Commitment
📅 1 Sunday per month
➕ Optional Saturdays | 4:00pm-7:00pm
⚠️ Limited places available.
👉 Register your interest today:

https://tally.so/r/gDp48d

Train. Perform. Inspire. Become a Majestic Elite Associate. 💜💛

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**20-21-22-25 lipca**

**Stawki: 140 – 280 zł gotówką po planie**

** **

Zapraszam na plany nowego serialu dla jednej z telewizji. Jesteśmy w temacie futbolu. I daleko od fair play ;).

Tym razem gramy sekwencje stadionowe przez kilka dni na stadionie w Ząbkach. Zapewniamy transport z Warszawy.

 

Kogo szukam?

 

**- KIBICE –** tzw. pikniki czyli wszyscy od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 60 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**

**- ULTRASI – **kobiety i mężczyźni od 16 lat (ukończonych) – ok. 50 lat. **Stawka 140 zł gotówką**. Spośród tej grupy reżyser będzie wybierał młodych mężczyzn do kontynuacji i do epizodów. **Stawka dla osób z kontynuacją 180 zł. Dla epizodów 250 zł.**

**- GNIAZDOWY / BĘBNIARZE –** z prawdziwego zdarzenia. Tu trzeba wiedzieć co robić. **Stawka 280 zł gotówką.**

** **

Do przydzielenia będą również role POLICJANTÓW Z PREWENCJI i PORZĄDKOWYCH.  **Stawka 140 zł gotówką.**

 

Zgłaszać można się na 1 dzień lub wszystkie 4 dni.

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień / dni**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka.

Kobiety mężczyźni 16-60 lat ZGŁOSZENIA NA MAIL: ewelina.wika@podtytutem.pl DUŻO POSTACI DO OBSADZENIA Kibice, mieszkańcy, policjanci wiele innych w ZAŁĄCZENIU PROSIMY 0: •imię nazwisko numer telefonu •miejscowość wzrost zdjęcie twarzy sylwetki SZCZEGÓŁY DOTYCZĄCE ZGŁOSZENIA w TREŚCI POSTA'

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY NON PROFIT

14.07-18.07 WARSZAWA, SKIERNIEWICE

Krótki metraż z humorem opowiada historię stereotypu ojca postawionego w realiach systemu kaucyjnego. Film przedstawia powstałe przez zachowanie ojca problemy rodzinne oraz wynikającą z tego relację, zdanego na siebie rodzeństwa.

Do etiudy do portfolio do Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukiwanych jest 

czterech MĘŻCZYZN W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli ojca, dwóch jego kolegów i sąsiada

dwie KOBIETY W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli sąsiadki ojca oraz żony jednego z jego znajomych

DZIEWCZYNA W WIEKU 19-24 LAT, do roli siostry

dwóch CHŁOPAKÓW W WIEKU 16-20 LAT do roli brata i jego znajomego

MAŁY CHŁOPIEC W WIEKU 8-12 LAT do roli dziecka spacerującego na chodniku

Proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej, na telefon: 607075035, lub na maila slawinskiantoni23@gmail.com

items.text:
Hi, beautiful people! 💜

I'm hoping to tap into this amazing community for a connection.

Does anyone know a photographer in the Colorado Springs area who might be interested in donating their time for a very special local nonprofit event?

In October, Angels of America's Fallen is hosting a small, exclusive theatrical Halloween runway experience at Garden of the Gods benefiting children and families of fallen military service members and first responders. We’re hoping to capture the incredible costumes, red carpet moments, and the magic of the evening while helping raise awareness for an organization that provides long-term support to children of our fallen heroes.

We’re looking for a photographer who may be willing to donate some time to capture professional photos of the event. In return, they would receive recognition on social media, the opportunity to showcase their work, and the chance to be part of an unforgettable evening supporting an amazing cause.

If you know someone who might be interested—or if that's you!—I’d love to connect. Please comment below or send me a message.

Thank you so much! 🖤🎃✨

Kraków, szukam aktorów do spektaklu

Do spektaklu niezależnej grupy teatralnej na podstawie autorskiego scenariusza szukam aktorów (niekoniecznie profesjonalnych), którzy wcieliliby się w role:
* poetki - Poli (pierwowzór - Barbara Baczyńska)
* braci żydowskich: Jakuba i Izaaka
* Starego Doktora (pierwowzór - Janusz Korczak)
* niemieckich oficerów

Przewidziana premiera spektaklu: październik/listopad 26. Projekt niekomercyjny aczkolwiek nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może ta historia zaprowadzić. Terminy prób do dogadania. Zapraszam na priv. Pozdrawiam.

items.text:
PILNE !!! WARSZAWA !!! GLINIARZE !!!

Do kolejnego lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję aktora do roli:

Cezar (25-45) - wierny żołnierz Kamyka. Dobrze zbudowany, typ „osiłka”.  
Daty: 13 i 14.07
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

Chętny Panów zapraszam do wysyłania PILNYCH zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
❤️ Kochani…
2 tygodnie temu prosiłam Was o pomoc dla Sławka.
Który uległ wypadkowi na początki czerwca 
Dziś z całego serca chcę Wam powiedzieć jedno…

DZIĘKUJĘ. ❤️

Dziękuję za każdą wpłatę, każde udostępnienie, każdy komentarz i każde dobre słowo. Dzięki Wam ta historia dotarła do wielu osób, a rodzina poczuła, że nie jest sama.

Nie potrafię przejść obojętnie obok tej historii. Z Jadzią znamy się od lat. To są naprawdę niezwykle dobrzy ludzie – pełni serca, życzliwości i gotowi pomagać innym. Wiem, ile dobra dali od siebie, dlatego dziś, kiedy oni potrzebują pomocy, czuję, że nie mogę milczeć.

Wierzę też, że Wy macie równie wielkie serca. Dlatego ponownie zwracam się do Was z prośbą.

Dziś mogę przekazać pierwsze dobre wiadomości…

❤️ Sławek się wybudził.
❤️ Zaczyna mówić.

To ogromny krok i wielki powód do nadziei.

Ale przed nim nadal jest bardzo długa i trudna droga.

Jego pamięć jest bardzo wybiórcza. Są chwile, kiedy pamięta, a za moment wiele rzeczy znów mu umyka. Lewa strona ciała jest mocno porażona i wymaga intensywnej rehabilitacji.

Mimo tego, kiedy patrzy się na Sławka, widać jedno…

On walczy całym sobą.

Każdy dzień to kolejny krok. Czasem maleńki, ale niezwykle ważny.

Cała rodzina jest przy nim każdego dnia. Masują go, rehabilitują, wspierają i wierzą, że będzie lepiej. Robią wszystko, co w ich mocy, ale to już nie wystarcza.

Już za chwilę Sławek rozpocznie specjalistyczną rehabilitację neurologiczną w Warszawie. To dla niego ogromna szansa na odzyskanie sprawności i powrót do rodziny.

Niestety koszt takiej rehabilitacji to około 40 tysięcy złotych miesięcznie. To kwota, której rodzina nie jest w stanie udźwignąć.

Dlatego po raz kolejny proszę Was o pomoc.

❤️ Każda, nawet najmniejsza wpłata ma znaczenie.
❤️ Każde udostępnienie może dotrzeć do kolejnych osób.
❤️ Każdy komentarz sprawia, że tę historię zobaczy więcej ludzi.

Dla nas to tylko chwila.

Dla Sławka może to być szansa na powrót do zdrowia.

Dla jego żony – szansa, by odzyskać ukochanego męża.

Dla dzieci – szansa, by znów mieć tatę, który będzie przy nich.

Wierzę, że wspólnie możemy zrobić jeszcze więcej.

Z całego serca dziękuję każdemu, kto już pomógł i każdemu, kto zdecyduje się pomóc teraz. ❤️

🔗 Zbiórka dla Sławka:
https://www.mammoc.pl/slawomir-wojewodzki

📱 BLIK: 512 773 649
Tytuł: Sławomir Wojewódzki

💳 Przelew:
16 1020 5226 0000 6602 0635 0765
Tytuł: Sławomir Wojewódzki

Dobro naprawdę wraca. Pomóżmy Sławkowi zawalczyć o życie, zdrowie i powrót do tych, którzy czekają na niego każdego dnia. ❤️🙏

items.text:
Hello everyone!

My name is Ava Frommell, and I'm the producer of **BROADCASTING 101**, a proof-of-concept television pilot filming in Bellmore, NY next week. Due to a last-minute casting change, we're urgently seeking an actor to play **RANDY FRIEDMAN**, one of our ensemble lead roles.

**Logline:**

In this mockumentary-style workplace comedy, a naively optimistic teen filmmaker leads a chaotic high school broadcasting program through constant production disasters, determined to prove that a group of misfit students can create something meaningful.

**ROLE: RANDY FRIEDMAN**
40s (Late 30s-Late 40s), Male, White, A Social Studies teacher and GCTV’s faculty advisor, though he functions more as a friend to the crew than a traditional authority figure. He is a gay, sports-obsessed Long Island staple with enough life experience and connections to fix almost any problem. He cares deeply about the program’s image—and his own—but his heart is always with the students. ENSEMBLE LEAD

**Project Details:**

Union: Non-Union
Rate: Copy/Credit/Meals Provided
Shoot Location: Bellmore, New York (Greater NYC area)
Shoot Window: July 14th-18th

If interested, please send an email to **pbtscasting@gmail.com** with your headshot or recent photo and a 60 second slate including your full name, height, confirmation of non-union status, confirmation of availability for full date range, confirmation that you’re able to work as a Long Island local, and talk about something you’re passionate about.

Please feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit. We'd love to hear from performers of all experience levels, and we're hoping to cast this role as soon as possible.

items.text:
How things have changed. 
Back around 2015 or so, I went to a SAG-AFTRA meeting that focused on social media, specifically Insragram. Back then, it was recommended that actors have a following of at least 10,000 (I still have my notes from that class). That is no longer the case. Check out this article from casting networks.
items.previewTitle: Do Followers Matter? Top Casting Directors Weigh in on Social Media and Acting Careers
items.previewDescription: Get insights from casting directors on when social media matters, when it doesn't, and how to combat a low following.

topComments.text: Focus on your craft, not your numbers.

🎬 PAID Background Artist Casting – Chatham

We’re looking for male background artists for Project 79 filming in Chatham.

📅 Shoot Dates: 15th–17th July 2026 (continuity required)
👤 Age: 20–40
🌍 Ethnicity: White / Caucasian / Middle Eastern
🕕 Call Time: Approx. 6:00 PM
📍 Location: Chatham
💷 Paid (additional pay for night shoots)

To apply, please send:
• A recent full-length photo
• Your full name
• Your travel plan

Please note: Transport is not provided, so you must be able to make your own way to the location.

📩 DM us or email: benaentertainmenthouse@gmail.com

items.text:
📣 ACTOR CALLOUT 🥂

Looking for our perfect Roger and David to star in the debut of *Speech, Speech* at SE Fest in London! 

Please follow the link below to submit your lovely self-tapes, as well as to find the audition pack:

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSftnWlqHZgPS7beG99WkiC7ZO0jwYdhtsjMGCSUpdBCt7-qhQ/viewform?usp=header)

If you have any additional access requirements, or any further questions then please message me directly, or email [tristan.simpson99@gmail.com](mailto:tristan.simpson99@gmail.com) 📧

Share far and wide with anyone you feel would be a good fit! 

We can’t wait to see them, go crazy with it  👀 🤪

items.text:
Dear ladies, I invite you to book a professional eyelash extension appointment with me 😍

and I’m looking for lash lift models

• Perfect retention up to 6 weeks without fills ⏳
• 7 years of experience
• One extension applied to each natural lash

🇺🇦 High-quality materials from Ukraine

📍 Located in Hollywood, Melrose Ave

🆘 Lash Lift – $30 🆘
Looking for models for my portfolio

Extensions:
• Classic — $120
• 2D — $120
• 3D — $120
• 4D–6D — $130

✅ Lash removal — free

💬 Real reviews: @rozaly_la

sharedPost.text:
GWCI is seeking people to portray young (20s-30s) hip/cool/edgy Nightclub Patrons for Paramount Pictures psychological thriller THE BUREAUCRAT 💃🎶
To submit, email all the following to njfilm@gwcnyc.com with the subject line “IG - NIGHTCLUB PATRONS”:
- your name
- phone number 
- are you SAG or NONSAG?
- age range 
- height, weight, clothing & shoe sizes 
- are you available for the tentative work date? 
- attach a few RECENT, clear photos of yourself 
#gwciseeking #EXTRAS #youngpeople #clublife

media.ocrText: May be an image of dancing and text that says 'እኧአእሆ casting call GWCIis is seeking people to portray young (20s-30s), HIP/COOL/EDGY NIGHTCLUB PATRONS for Paramount Pictures psychological thriller THE BUREAUCRAT MUST BE OK WITH STROBE LIGHTS, LOUD MUSIC, AND ATMOSPHERIC SMOKE/ HAZE TENTATIVE SHOOT DATE: THURSDAY, JULY 23, 2026 AG-AFTRA PAY RATE: $231/8 HRS NON-SAG PAY RATE: $187/10HRS 10HRS FILMING IN PATTERSON, NJ TRANSPORTATION PROVIDED FROM MANHATTAN) መመተዮእኢላ'

items.text:
DANCER OPEN CALL for Awakening at Wynn Las Vegas

*It is not necessary to submit your information before attending an open call*

Las Vegas on Monday, July 27, 2026
Millennium Dance Complex Las Vegas
6675 South Tenaya Way, suite 120
Las Vegas, NV 89113

Men at 10:00a, sign in at 9:30a
Ladies at 11:30a, sign in at 11:00a

Final Callbacks Will Be Held On Tuesday, July 28 in Las Vegas

Please bring a hard copy of your headshot/resume
Please wear form-fitting clothing, no baggy clothes
Flat shoes/sneakers please- ladies please also bring heels

21+ only please

May vary in height between 5'4" - 6'3" 

All performers must be willing to relocate to Las Vegas for a one-year contract (relocation package provided)

Benefits from eligible date of hire

Must be authorized to work in the U.S.

This is a non-union production

Please submit online if unable to attend an open call:

[Awakening.castingcrane.com](http://awakening.castingcrane.com/)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'AWAKENING NOW CASTING DANCERS OPEN AUDITION JULY JULY27TH 27TH MILLENNIUM DANCE COMPLEX LAS VEGAS'

items.text:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

items.summary:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!
items.title: **Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

items.text:
Evalution Media and SwanWing Productions are teaming up to bring you a triple-bill of short plays - including the adaptation of Eva Marie Wilshere 's multi-award winning short film, The Year Dot 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Each play is a one-hander (with the exception of the carer at the end of The Year Dot, the longest of the three plays)

We're looking to cast the perfect actress for both Dot and Brenda, paying equity rates of at least £133 for each of the two performances in Nov/early Dec.

**[Saskia Wesnigk-Wood](https://www.linkedin.com/in/saskia-wesnigk-wood-b75a48222/)** of SwanWing Productions will also be auditioning for a male identifying actor for one of her two short plays.
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
All auditions are on Sunday 19th July 2-4pm - please contact us to see the script excerpts in advance **[info@evalutionmedia.com](mailto:info@evalutionmedia.com)**

sharedPost.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️CASTING CALL ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
 1 female identifying, 1 male identifying - please email info@evalutionmedia.com for the audition script excerpts. 
(check spelling if you don't hear back)

For a triple bill play production in November 2026, including the play adaptation of The Year Dot and two wonderful short plays by Saskia Wesnigk! 

The roles will be paid in line with equity for fringe theatre productions.

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'EVALUTION SwanWingProductions SwanWing Productions & CASTING CALL Fringe Theatre Production (Paid November performances) L LEADING LADY Playing age: 70+ Brenda Happily independent and eccentric. She constantly chats to her pets, but advancing age is catching up with her energy. Dot A vibrant, spirited party-lover. Fiercely optimistic, she masks a growing physical fragility with a determination to host one last, unforgettable celebration. LEADING MAN Jack Playing age: 70+ Bitter, resentful, and isolated. Stripped of his independence by a stroke, he lashes out at everyone while harbouring a deep grief. Auditions @Caroline of Brunswick 2-4PM PM SUN 19TH JULY'

items.text:
I am going to be doing a series of online readings (on Zoom) with 2 to 3 hours of rehearsal a week to show the work we do at my studio.

If you’re interested in doing short bursts of hard work and then presenting it as a “online staged reading” that isn’t your mama’s staged reading…

DM me with info below ⬇️ in comments 

#stagedreadings #acting #actors

items.text:
We're back! Submissions are open for World Monologue Games 2026!

World Monologue Games is a global acting competition and virtual showcase, allowing professional and budding actors from anywhere in the world to participate. 

Video submissions. Free entry. Cash prizes. Be seen by industry professionals and leaders.

Submission deadline Thu 13th August 2026.
Sign up now to participate:
https://worldmonologuegames.com/?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=allactorsonfacebook&utm_campaign=wmgsubs202607-1&asset=wmgsubsq8&copy=wmgsubcopy1&postby=LN

items.title: Kompars:innen für studentischen Kurzfilm gesucht!

items.text:
Grüßt euch,                                                                   
ein 14-jähriges Kind mit viel Motivation und wenig Erfahrung im Schauspielbereich, sucht Schauspieljobs, um Erfahrungen zu sammeln, damit sie einmal ihren großen Traum, ein beliebter Schauspieler zu sein erfüllen kann. 
Sie sucht Jobs ausschließlich in Bayern, falls jemand helfen kann oder eine Firma oder einen Filmproduzer kennt, bitte bei uns melden. 
Sprachen: Englisch, Deutsch und Ungarisch.
Wir würden uns sehr freuen! 
Vielen Dank für das Zuhören.                                           
  
Liebe Grüße❤️

topComments.text: Ich empfehle TalentiQ in Düsseldorf bei Roxane

items.title: Grüßt euch,

items.text:
**CASTING CALL | Social-Media-Clip | Stuttgart | 19.07.2026**

Für die Produktion eines **Social-Media-Clips für eine aufstrebende Streetwear-Marke** suchen wir noch drei Darstellerfür einen Drehtag in **Stuttgart**.

**Gesucht werden**

**Arzt**
* männlich
* ca. 50–70 Jahre

**Empfangsmitarbeiterin**
* weiblich
* ca. 30–50 Jahre

**Patient / Patientin im Wartezimmer**
* ca. 50–80 Jahre
* gerne mit markantem oder besonderem Look
* ein eigener Hund ist ein Plus, aber kein Muss

**Dreh:** 19.07.2026
**Ort:** Stuttgart
**Drehdauer:** je nach Rolle ca. 1–3 Stunden
**Vergütung:** Gage, individuell je nach Rolle

Schauspielerische Erfahrung ist von Vorteil, aber keine Voraussetzung. Uns sind vor allem authentische Persönlichkeiten mit einer natürlichen Ausstrahlung wichtig.

Bei Interesse schickt uns bitte eine E-Mail an **[sven@versusarchive.com](mailto:sven@versusarchive.com)** mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Alter
* Wohnort
* ggf. kurzer Vita oder schauspielerischer Erfahrung

Falls ihr euch in den genannten Rollen nicht wiederfindet, aber trotzdem Lust habt, Teil des Projekts zu sein, schreibt uns gerne trotzdem. Wir sind auf der Suche nach interessanten Gesichtern und authentischen Persönlichkeiten für eine Szene im Wartezimmer.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

Vorverkauf gestartet: 
  TRAIN45: Summer Jump 2026

  Gentlemens Rockabilly  mit 
Sievert Ahrend, Reinhard de Witt und Ernst Wiemer 

Ob von Deutsch zu Englisch, ob von Country zu Rockn`Roll, ob von Banjo zu Gitarre; hier ist nix gehupft wie gesprungen, sondern es geht ab mit z.T. neuen Songs, veränderten Arrangements und einem Ernst Wiemer am Saxophon on Top!
Zu hören und zu sehen am:
Freitag, d. 04. September 2026, 20 Uhr
Samstag, d. 05. September 2026, 20 Uhr
Kulturspeicher Leer

Karten 🎫 für beide Konzerte gibt es bei:
Haushaltswaren Hibben ☎️ 0491-928690, 
Sievert Ahrend ☎️ 0491-3077,
 📱 0172-4579778,
Email: sievert.ahrend@gmx.de 
und (wenn noch vorhanden) an der Abendkasse.

sharedPost.text:
Du bist „UnSCHLAGERbar®“? Du bist „Sexy, Cool, Heiß & Trendy“?

Mit unseren exklusiven UnSCHLAGERbar-Shirts setzt du ein Statement – für gute Laune, unvergessliche Partynächte und die Liebe zum Schlager. Egal ob auf der nächsten Schlagerparty, dem Festival, beim Stadtfest oder einfach im Alltag: Mit diesem Shirt bist du garantiert UnSCHLAGERbar!

Erhältlich in verschiedenen Farben – so bunt wie die schönsten Hits und die besten Partys!

Weitere Informationen unter www.unschlagerbar.de oder https://dominchen.de/un-schlage-rbar/ 

Denn eins ist klar: Dieses Genre ist und bleibt UnSCHLAGERbar®! 

#UnSCHLAGERbar #Schlager #Party #GuteLaune #Festival #MusikVerbindet #TShirt #Merch #Lifestyle #Feiern #Schlagerliebe #Partystimmung #Kölschglück #Partyschlager

A dad looking to buy gifts for his wife and son in the laziest way possible.

Male 25-60 years old

An ethereal character of vague origins. Imposing, scary.

REPORTER

Female, 20-40 years old

A news reporter on-site describing a situation.

Each role pays $15/hr.

Message me for any details. Looking for brief audition videos which I can provide lines for.

Thank you!
